schema_note: Copilot Studio agent — built in Copilot Studio UI with Power Automate approval flows.
name: App Registration Governance
description: Audits app registrations for over-permissioned scopes, missing owners, stale credentials, and routes remediation through approval.

conversation_starters.text: Show me all app registrations with no assigned owner
Which service principals have Mail permissions and no activity in 90 days?
Run a governance audit and score all our app registrations by risk
